elementos.descricao: Modelo com semijoias Piuka — colares de pérolas sobrepostos, ear cuff floral, pulseiras douradas, top creme com babados, fundo rosé/nude quente. Pose reclinada apoiando rosto na mão, olhar direto para a câmera.

imagens_referencia.descricao: Modelo fornecida pela equipe — mulher loira, semijoias douradas e pérolas, top creme com babados, fundo rosé/nude quente, pose reclinada

prompt_freepik_gerado: Wide promotional banner 1920x560px for a Brazilian fine jewelry brand. RIGHT HALF: a close-up photo-realistic image of a beautiful young woman with wavy ombre brown-to-blonde hair, wearing layered pearl and gold chain necklaces, a floral ear cuff, gold pearl bracelets, and a cream ruffled top. She rests her chin on her hand, smiling softly and looking directly at the camera. Warm peach-pink studio background. Elegant, feminine, editorial mood. LEFT HALF: solid warm background in hex #F4EAE2 — completely empty, reserved for text overlay. No text, no logo, no watermarks anywhere in the image. Soft natural studio lighting, high-end jewelry advertisement aesthetic.
